zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Mauleverer於1382年出生在英國越可爾阿可利福時，她的父親Sir Peter Maulever28歲，母親Lady Katherine Maulever22歲。她於1399年與SIR JOHN MIDDLETON在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Mauleverer于1382年出生在英国越可爾阿可利福时，她的父亲Sir Peter Maulever28岁，母亲Lady Katherine Maulever22岁。她于1399年与SIR JOHN MIDDLETON在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauleverer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal leverier ‘bad harrier’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Mauleverer was born in 1382, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Peter Maulever, was 28 and her mother, Lady Katherine Maulever, was 22. She married SIR JOHN MIDDLETON in 1399, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1430, in Middleton, Westmorland, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Mauleverer est née en 1382, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter Maulever, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Maulever, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé SIR JOHN MIDDLETON en 1399, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Middleton, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Mauleverer 1382 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter Maulever 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Maulever 22. Sie hat 1399 in Devon, England, United Kingdom SIR JOHN MIDDLETON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Middleton, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Mauleverer è nata il nel 1382 nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter Maulever, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Maulever, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato SIR JOHN MIDDLETON nel 1399, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1430, nel Middleton, Westmorland, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Maulevererが1382年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフで生まれた時，父Sir Peter Mauleverは28歳，母Lady Katherine Mauleverは22歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスデボンでSIR JOHN MIDDLETONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスウエストモーランドミッドレトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Mauleverer(이)가 1382년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter Maulever(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Maulever(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 SIR JOHN MIDDLETON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 미들레턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Mauleverer nasceu em 1382, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter Maulever, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Maulever, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com SIR JOHN MIDDLETON em 1399, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Mauleverer родилась в 1382 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter Maulever было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Maulever, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени SIR JOHN MIDDLETON в 1399 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности миддлетон, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Mauleverer nació en 1382, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter Maulever, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Maulever, tenía 22 años. Se casó con SIR JOHN MIDDLETON en 1399, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1430, en Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
